actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour fileID 3953368309659336407 (guid b2dd7fabdb14fca498bd9e0def11ab19) is Unity.VRTemplate.AnchorVisuals on PrefabInstance 'Teleport Anchor'. Trigger OnAnchorEnter to simulate teleport interactor hover enter: expects fade animation to play forward from start and arrow tween to target height using m_ArrowAnimationDuration=0.375 and the serialized AnimationCurve.

Same MonoBehaviour (fileID 3953368309659336407). Trigger OnAnchorExit to simulate teleport interactor hover exit: expects fade animation to play in reverse at 1.5x speed and arrow tween back to height 0 per serialized AnimationCurve.
Same MonoBehaviour (fileID 3953368309659336407). Trigger HideArrowOnTeleport to simulate the moment of teleport: expects arrow localScale to be set to Vector3.zero to hide the arrow.
